TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Isawalian pahikukian = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Ciansyang ka alang Isawalian pahikukian. 972 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 2,516 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 26% niqan 646 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 74% niqan 1,870 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 18%, Tayal 1%, Bunun 1%.
S.PHON: = isawalian paħikukian = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən ʦiansjaŋ ka alaŋ isawalian paħikukian. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis **%, tajal *%, bunun *%.
S.FORM: = Isawalian pahikukian = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Ciansyang ka alang Isawalian pahikukian. 972 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 2,516 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 26% niqan 646 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 74% niqan 1,870 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 18%, Tayal 1%, Bunun 1%.
S.PHON: = isawalian paħikukian = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən ʦiansjaŋ ka alaŋ isawalian paħikukian. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, amis **%, tajal *%, bunun *%.
